instruction: Complete a sequential dependency chain in CS201: (1) First, complete the next available module's content items (reading and video). (2) Then submit the module's linked quiz assignment with file "quiz_answers.pdf". (3) After the quiz, complete the peer review for a classmate's essay (score all rubric criteria with at least 30 characters of comments). (4) Finally, submit your own project assignment with file "project_final.pdf". You must complete these in order -- the quiz must be submitted before the peer review, and the peer review before the project.
